title: SSA Periodic Continuing Disability Reviews Processed, FY2013–FY2022
description: National counts of periodic CDRs processed each fiscal year, broken down by a hierarchical program-involvement taxonomy (Title II, Title XVI, concurrent; disabled workers vs auxiliaries; SSI adult vs child categories) plus processing channel (mailers, full medical reviews) and outcomes (initial cessations).

columns.name: PROGRAM INVOLVEMENT
columns.description: Hierarchical category label. Includes section headers (I. Periodic CDRs initiated centrally; II. Other Periodic CDRs; III. Administrative Closures), roll-up rows (Total Title II, Total Title XVI Only, TOTAL) and leaf rows (Disabled workers, Auxiliaries and survivors, Disabled adults/children, Low birth weight, Age 18 redeterminations, Other SSI children). DO NOT sum leaf + roll-up rows together.

columns.name: TOTAL CDRS PROCESSED
columns.description: Total periodic CDRs processed for the category.

columns.name: MAILERS ONLY
columns.description: CDRs resolved via mailer questionnaire only (no full medical review).

columns.name: INITIAL FIELD OFFICE FTC TERMINATIONS *
columns.description: Failure-to-cooperate terminations initiated by the field office (* SSA footnote).

columns.name: FULL MEDICAL REVIEWS (FMRS)
columns.description: CDRs decided via full medical review.

columns.name: INITIAL CESSATIONS (FMRS)
columns.description: Initial benefit cessations resulting from full medical reviews.

notes: Footnotes in column/section names: * field-office FTC terminations; ** Other Periodic CDRs not initiated centrally; *** Administrative Closures. Section-header rows (e.g. 'I. Periodic CDRs (initiated centrally)') carry blank metric cells. Numeric cells are thousands-separated and quoted.
